name: GO IRL — AI Developer Orchestra — Staff OS Operations Layer

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{...$json,success:true,status:'DRY_RUN_COMPLETE',next_action:'create Data Table, bind five credentials, configure placeholders, then run disposable mission'}}];

options.systemMessage: You are the report-only GO IRL Project Coordinator. GitHub main is source of truth. Follow docs/onboarding/AI_ROLES.md and docs/governance/AI_ORGANIZATION.md. Do not activate every role. Do not authorize code writes, commit, push, PR, merge, deploy, Auth, RLS, SQL, migration, secrets, production data, DOCS_INDEX, Knowledge Debt closure, or beta/release-ready claims. Output JSON only.
Act only as the role named in the input. Stay report-only. Do not write files, access secrets/private data, or claim external actions. GitHub main is source of truth. Output JSON only.

You are the bounded GO IRL Critic. You run only for conflict, invalid result, or high-risk recommendation without evidence. This is the only critic cycle. Do not create a correction loop. Output JSON only.

parameters.jsCode: const raw=String($json.text??$json.output??'').trim().replace(/^```json\s*/i,'').replace(/```$/,'').trim();let critic;try{critic=JSON.parse(raw)}catch{throw new Error('CRITIC_JSON_INVALID')}const base=$('Detect Critic Requirement').first().json;if(critic.mission_id!==base.runtime.mission_id)throw new Error('CRITIC_CONTRACT_INVALID');return [{json:{...base,critic_result:critic}}];

const c=$json.critic_result||{};const now=new Date();const date=now.toISOString().slice(0,10);const next=new Date(+now+604800000).toISOString().slice(0,10);const reason=[...(c.conflicts||[]),...(c.evidence_gaps||[])].map(x=>String(x).slice(0,300)).slice(0,6);const activated=JSON.parse($json.queue_record.activated_roles_json||'[]');const skipped=JSON.parse($json.queue_record.skipped_roles_json||'[]');const reportName=date+'-agent-report-'+$json.runtime.mission_id+'.md';const report=['---','title: Agent Report','owner: Project Coordinator','status: Draft','source_of_truth: false','last_review: '+date,'next_review: '+next,'---','','# Agent Report','','## Task',$json.mission.objective,'','## Files inspected',...$json.mission.source_of_truth_refs.map(x=>'- '+x),'','## Activated roles',...activated.map(x=>'- '+x),'','## Skipped roles',...skipped.map(x=>'- '+x),'','## Findings',...(reason.length?reason.map(x=>'- '+x):['- Critic blocked the Mission.']),'','## Changes made','- No publish action was performed.','','## Checks','- typecheck: NOT RUN','- lint: NOT RUN','- build: NOT RUN','- test: NOT RUN','','## Runtime status',String($json.runtime.status),'','## ClickUp','- Mission record will be updated to Blocked.','','## GitHub','- GitHub main remains the source of truth.','- Commit: not created.','- Push: not performed.','- Draft PR: not created.','- Publish preview: not ready.','','## Risks','- Human review is required before any continuation.','','## Next step',String(c.next_action||'Review the conflict and choose one bounded action.')].join('\n');return [{json:{...$json,report_name:reportName,report_content:report,blocked_reason:reason.join('; ')||'Critic blocked the Mission.',integration_stage:'drive'}}];

const id=$json.runtime.mission_id;const changed=Array.isArray($json.selected_files)?$json.selected_files:[];const checks=['typecheck: PASS','lint: PASS','build: PASS','test: PASS'];const text=['ТРЕБУЕТСЯ ПОДТВЕРЖДЕНИЕ','','Mission:',id,'','Изменённые файлы:',...(changed.length?changed.map(x=>'- '+x):['Список будет подтверждён владельцем в команде.']),'','Проверки:',...checks.map(x=>'- '+x),'','Команда:','/approve '+id+' exact/file1,exact/file2'].join('\n');return [{json:{...$json,telegram_message:text}}];

options.systemMessage: You are the final report-only GO IRL Coordinator. Do not claim a commit, push, Draft PR, merge, or deploy happened when Runtime returned only publish_preview. Output JSON only.

parameters.jsCode: const raw=String($json.text??$json.output??'').trim().replace(/^\x60\x60\x60json\s*/i,'').replace(/\x60\x60\x60$/,'').trim();let s;try{s=JSON.parse(raw)}catch{throw new Error('FINAL_SYNTHESIS_JSON_INVALID')}const base=$('Parse Publish Preview').first().json;const now=new Date();const date=now.toISOString().slice(0,10);const next=new Date(+now+604800000).toISOString().slice(0,10);const activated=JSON.parse(base.queue_record.activated_roles_json||'[]');const skipped=JSON.parse(base.queue_record.skipped_roles_json||'[]');const files=base.selected_files||[];const codeReference='Publish preview ready. Draft PR execution requires separate GitHub Operator approval.';const reportName=date+'-agent-report-'+base.mission_id+'.md';const tick=String.fromCharCode(96);const report=['---','title: Agent Report','owner: Project Coordinator','status: Draft','source_of_truth: false','last_review: '+date,'next_review: '+next,'---','','# Agent Report','','## Task',base.mission.objective,'','## Files inspected',...base.mission.source_of_truth_refs.map(x=>'- '+tick+x+tick),'','## Activated roles',...(activated.length?activated.map(x=>'- '+x):['- Not recorded.']),'','## Skipped roles',...(skipped.length?skipped.map(x=>'- '+x):['- Not recorded.']),'','## Findings',...(Array.isArray(s.result_lines)?s.result_lines.slice(0,4).map(x=>'- '+x):['- Runtime workflow completed.']),'','## Changes made',...(files.length?files.map(x=>'- '+tick+x+tick):['- No changed files recorded.']),'','## Checks','- typecheck: PASS','- lint: PASS','- build: PASS','- test: PASS','- git diff --check: PASS','','## Runtime status',String(base.runtime.status),'','## ClickUp',base.clickup_task_url||('https://app.clickup.com/t/'+base.queue_record.clickup_task_id),'','## GitHub','- Source of truth: https://github.com/vitvolny26-art/GO-IRL-1.0/tree/main','- Commit: not created.','- Push: not performed.','- Draft PR: not created.','- '+codeReference,'','## Risks','- Google Drive and ClickUp are mirrors, not sources of truth.','- Workflow remains inactive until disposable live testing.','','## Next step','- Human reviews the publish preview and separately authorizes GitHub Operator execution.'].join('\n');return [{json:{...base,final_synthesis:s,report_name:reportName,report_content:report,code_reference:codeReference,checks:{typecheck:'PASS',lint:'PASS',build:'PASS',test:'PASS'},integration_stage:'drive'}}];

parameters.content:
## GO IRL AI Developer Orchestra — Operations Layer

**GitHub main is the only source of truth. n8n stores integration state only.**

### Required setup
1. Create Data Table `go_irl_mission_queue` with the schema documented in `docs/automation/GO_IRL_AI_DEVELOPER_ORCHESTRA_OPERATIONS.md`. Replace `MISSION_QUEUE_DATA_TABLE_ID` in every Data Table node.
2. Replace `TELEGRAM_USER_ID` and `/opt/go-irl/GO-IRL-1.0`.
3. Bind Telegram, SSH, OpenRouter, ClickUp, and Google Drive credentials.
4. Inspect ClickUp List 901219478483 status mapping during the disposable run.
5. Keep inactive until Manual Dry Run and disposable live mission pass.

### Boundaries
- queued missions do not call Runtime until promoted; mission-intake.cjs remains the only Runtime intake.
- every later Runtime command uses bridge.cjs.
- no Runtime state file access, merge, deploy, force push, production write, NotebookLM API, or invented PR/check result.
- ClickUp and Drive are mirrors.
- existing export script is recorded but not invoked automatically.
- integration retry counter is capped at one and never restarts implementation.
- publish preview does not release the Runtime slot. Mission remains awaiting human review until a future bridge-supported publish/archive path completes.

parameters.jsCode: const base=$('Build Mission JSON').first().json;const row=$input.all().map(i=>i.json||{}).find(x=>x.mission_id===base.mission_id);return [{json:{...base,duplicate_mission:!!row,existing_queue_record:row||null}}];

const row=$json.existing_queue_record||{};return [{json:{...$json,telegram_message:['ПРИНЯТО','','Mission:',$json.mission_id,'','Задача:',$json.mission_title,'','Статус:',String(row.integration_status||'queued'),'','Повторная обработка не запущена.'].join('\n')}}];

const now=new Date().toISOString();const q={mission_id:$json.mission_id,mission_json:JSON.stringify($json.mission),mission_title:$json.mission_title,telegram_chat_id:$json.chat_id,telegram_user_id:$json.telegram_user_id,clickup_task_id:'',clickup_status_map_json:'{}',drive_report_file_id:'',integration_status:'received',runtime_status:'not_started',sync_status:'pending',last_processed_at:now,retry_count:0,received_at:$json.received_at||now,activated_roles_json:'[]',skipped_roles_json:'[]',budget_usd:$json.mission.maximum_budget_usd,github_url:'https://github.com/vitvolny26-art/GO-IRL-1.0/tree/main',next_action:'queue_admission',selected_files_json:'[]',export_refresh_required:false};return [{json:{...$json,queue_record:q}}];

const base=$('Queue — Build Received Record').first().json;const active=$input.all().map(i=>i.json||{}).filter(x=>x.mission_id&&x.mission_id!==base.mission_id);const shouldStart=active.length===0;const now=new Date().toISOString();const q={...base.queue_record,integration_status:shouldStart?'running':'queued',runtime_status:'not_started',sync_status:'pending',last_processed_at:now,next_action:shouldStart?'mission_intake':'wait_for_active_mission'};return [{json:{...base,queue_record:q,should_start_runtime:shouldStart,active_mission_id:active[0]?.mission_id||null}}];
return [{json:$('Queue — Decide Admission').first().json}];

const base=$('Queue — Restore Admission Context').first().json;const statuses=Array.isArray($json.statuses)?$json.statuses:[];const lower=x=>String(x||'').toLowerCase();const pick=(names,types=[])=>{const exact=statuses.find(s=>names.includes(lower(s.status||s.name)));if(exact)return String(exact.status||exact.name);const typed=statuses.find(s=>types.includes(lower(s.type)));return typed?String(typed.status||typed.name):''};const map={todo:pick(['to do','todo','open'],['open']),in_progress:pick(['in progress','working','active']),review:pick(['review','in review','awaiting review']),blocked:pick(['blocked','on hold']),complete:pick(['complete','completed','closed','done'],['closed'])};if(!map.todo||!map.in_progress||!map.complete)throw new Error('CLICKUP_REQUIRED_STATUSES_NOT_FOUND');const wanted=base.queue_record.integration_status==='running'?map.in_progress:map.todo;if(!wanted)throw new Error('CLICKUP_STATUS_MAPPING_REQUIRED');const marker='go_irl_mission_id:'+base.mission_id;const description=[marker,'mission_id: '+base.mission_id,'Source: Telegram','Original request: '+base.mission.objective,'Activated roles: pending','Skipped roles: pending','Runtime status: '+base.queue_record.runtime_status,'Budget: USD '+base.mission.maximum_budget_usd,'GitHub main: https://github.com/vitvolny26-art/GO-IRL-1.0/tree/main','Draft PR: not created; publish preview only after approval.','Drive Agent Report: pending','Next step: '+base.queue_record.next_action,'GitHub is the source of truth.'].join('\n');return [{json:{...base,clickup_status_map:map,clickup_status_name:wanted,clickup_marker:marker,clickup_task_name:'[GO IRL Mission] '+base.mission_title,clickup_description:description,integration_stage:'clickup'}}];

const base=$('ClickUp — Build Mission Payload').first().json;const task=$input.all().map(i=>i.json||{}).find(t=>String(t.description||t.text_content||'').includes(base.clickup_marker));return [{json:{...base,clickup_task_exists:!!task?.id,clickup_task_id:task?.id?String(task.id):'',clickup_task_url:task?.url||''}}];

const base=$('ClickUp — Find Mission Task').first().json;const id=String($json.id||base.clickup_task_id||'');if(!id)throw new Error('CLICKUP_TASK_ID_MISSING');const url=String($json.url||base.clickup_task_url||('https://app.clickup.com/t/'+id));const q={...base.queue_record,clickup_task_id:id,clickup_status_map_json:JSON.stringify(base.clickup_status_map),last_processed_at:new Date().toISOString()};return [{json:{...base,clickup_task_id:id,clickup_task_url:url,queue_record:q}}];

const base=$('ClickUp — Capture Mission Record').first().json;const state=base.queue_record.integration_status==='running'?'Running':'Queued';const text=['ПРИНЯТО','','Mission:',base.mission_id,'','Задача:',base.mission_title,'','Статус:',state].join('\n');return [{json:{...base,telegram_message:text}}];
return [{json:$('Build Mission Accepted Notification').first().json}];
return [{json:{success:true,mission_id:$json.mission_id,status:'queued',next_action:'queue_pump',external_writes_completed:['ClickUp mission record','Telegram accepted notification']}}];

const base=$json;const mission=base.mission||JSON.parse(base.queue_record.mission_json);const missionB64=Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(mission),'utf8').toString('base64');const repo=base.runner_repo_path||'/opt/go-irl/GO-IRL-1.0';const actor=String(base.actor||('telegram:'+base.queue_record.telegram_user_id)).replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9:_-]/g,'');const runtimeCommand="cd '"+repo+"' && printf '%s' '"+missionB64+"' | base64 -d | node scripts/ai-orchestrator/mission-intake.cjs --actor '"+actor+"'";return [{json:{...base,mission,mission_id:mission.mission_id,chat_id:base.chat_id||base.queue_record.telegram_chat_id,telegram_user_id:base.telegram_user_id||base.queue_record.telegram_user_id,actor,runner_repo_path:repo,integration_stage:'runtime_intake',runtime_command:runtimeCommand}}];

const rows=$input.all().map(i=>i.json||{}).filter(x=>x.mission_id);const active=rows.find(x=>['running','awaiting_human_approval'].includes(x.integration_status));const queued=rows.filter(x=>x.integration_status==='queued'&&Number(x.retry_count||0)<=1).sort((a,b)=>String(a.received_at).localeCompare(String(b.received_at)));const candidate=!active?queued[0]:null;return [{json:{should_start_runtime:!!candidate,active_mission_id:active?.mission_id||null,queue_record:candidate||null}}];
return [{json:{success:true,status:'idle',active_mission_id:$json.active_mission_id||null,next_action:'wait'}}];

const q={...$json.queue_record,integration_status:'running',runtime_status:'not_started',sync_status:'pending',last_processed_at:new Date().toISOString(),next_action:'mission_intake'};const mission=JSON.parse(q.mission_json);return [{json:{mission,mission_id:q.mission_id,mission_title:q.mission_title,chat_id:q.telegram_chat_id,telegram_user_id:q.telegram_user_id,actor:'telegram:'+q.telegram_user_id,runner_repo_path:'/opt/go-irl/GO-IRL-1.0',queue_record:q,should_start_runtime:true}}];
return [{json:$('Queue Pump — Promote Candidate').first().json}];
return [{json:$('Queue Pump — Restore Promoted Mission').first().json}];

const q={...$json.queue_record,integration_status:'running',runtime_status:$json.runtime.status,activated_roles_json:JSON.stringify($json.routing.activated_roles||[]),skipped_roles_json:JSON.stringify($json.routing.skipped_roles||[]),last_processed_at:new Date().toISOString(),next_action:'context_build'};return [{json:{...$json,queue_record:q}}];
return [{json:$('Queue — Record Selected Roles').first().json}];

const map=JSON.parse($json.queue_record.clickup_status_map_json||'{}');if(!map.review)throw new Error('CLICKUP_REVIEW_STATUS_NOT_FOUND');const q={...$json.queue_record,integration_status:'awaiting_human_approval',runtime_status:$json.runtime.status,sync_status:'pending',last_processed_at:new Date().toISOString(),next_action:'human_approval'};const activated=JSON.parse(q.activated_roles_json||'[]');const skipped=JSON.parse(q.skipped_roles_json||'[]');const description=['go_irl_mission_id:'+$json.mission_id,'mission_id: '+$json.mission_id,'Source: Telegram','Original request: '+$json.mission.objective,'Activated roles: '+(activated.join(', ')||'none'),'Skipped roles: '+(skipped.join(', ')||'none'),'Runtime status: '+$json.runtime.status,'Budget: USD '+$json.mission.maximum_budget_usd,'GitHub main: https://github.com/vitvolny26-art/GO-IRL-1.0/tree/main','Draft PR: not created.','Drive Agent Report: pending','Next step: Human approval.','GitHub is the source of truth.'].join('\n');return [{json:{...$json,queue_record:q,clickup_review_status:map.review,clickup_description:description}}];
return [{json:$('Queue — Mark Awaiting Human Approval').first().json}];
return [{json:$('Queue — Restore Approval Request Context').first().json}];

const cmd=$('Human Approval Gate — Telegram Owner').first().json;const row=$input.all().map(i=>i.json||{}).find(x=>x.mission_id===cmd.mission_id);if(!row)throw new Error('APPROVAL_QUEUE_MISSION_NOT_FOUND');if(row.telegram_user_id!==cmd.telegram_user_id)throw new Error('APPROVAL_OWNER_MISMATCH');const mission=JSON.parse(row.mission_json);return [{json:{...cmd,mission,mission_title:row.mission_title,queue_record:row,chat_id:row.telegram_chat_id,runner_repo_path:'/opt/go-irl/GO-IRL-1.0'}}];

parameters.queryString: ={{ "'1skcboyr_rPQOFN34iwMAqRvf97BYVllJ' in parents and name = '" + $json.report_name.replace(/'/g, "\'") + "' and trashed = false" }}

parameters.jsCode: const base=$('Build Telegram Completion Message').first().json;const file=$input.all().map(i=>i.json||{}).find(x=>x.id&&x.name===base.report_name);return [{json:{...base,drive_file_exists:!!file?.id,existing_drive_file_id:file?.id?String(file.id):'',existing_drive_url:file?.webViewLink||''}}];

const base=$('Drive — Select Existing Agent Report').first().json;const id=String($json.id||base.existing_drive_file_id||'');if(!id)throw new Error('DRIVE_REPORT_ID_MISSING');const url=String($json.webViewLink||base.existing_drive_url||('https://drive.google.com/file/d/'+id+'/view'));const q={...base.queue_record,drive_report_file_id:id,integration_status:'completed',runtime_status:base.runtime.status,sync_status:'drive_synced',last_processed_at:new Date().toISOString(),next_action:'clickup_complete',selected_files_json:JSON.stringify(base.selected_files||[]),export_refresh_required:true};return [{json:{...base,drive_report_file_id:id,drive_report_url:url,queue_record:q,integration_stage:'clickup'}}];
return [{json:$('Drive — Capture Report Link').first().json}];

const map=JSON.parse($json.queue_record.clickup_status_map_json||'{}');if(!map.review)throw new Error('CLICKUP_REVIEW_STATUS_NOT_FOUND');const activated=JSON.parse($json.queue_record.activated_roles_json||'[]');const skipped=JSON.parse($json.queue_record.skipped_roles_json||'[]');const description=['go_irl_mission_id:'+$json.mission_id,'mission_id: '+$json.mission_id,'Source: Telegram','Original request: '+$json.mission.objective,'Activated roles: '+(activated.join(', ')||'none'),'Skipped roles: '+(skipped.join(', ')||'none'),'Runtime status: '+$json.runtime.status,'Budget: USD '+$json.mission.maximum_budget_usd,'GitHub main: https://github.com/vitvolny26-art/GO-IRL-1.0/tree/main','Draft PR: not created; Publish preview ready.','Drive Agent Report: '+$json.drive_report_url,'Next step: Human review and separate GitHub Operator approval.','GitHub is the source of truth.'].join('\n');return [{json:{...$json,clickup_description:description,clickup_review_status:map.review}}];

const base=$('ClickUp — Build Final Mission Update').first().json;const q={...base.queue_record,integration_status:'awaiting_human_approval',sync_status:'synced',last_processed_at:new Date().toISOString(),next_action:'separate GitHub Operator approval',export_refresh_required:true};const export_manifest={export_refresh_required:true,existing_script:'scripts/build-notebooklm-txt.cjs',include:['docs/**','src/**','tests/**','scripts/**','supabase/**/*.md','supabase/**/*.sql','*.md','*.json','*.config.*'],exclude:['.env*','.git/**','node_modules/**','dist/**','.vercel/**','package-lock.json','GO IRL DOC/**'],script_invoked:false};return [{json:{...base,queue_record:q,export_manifest,clickup_task_url:'https://app.clickup.com/t/'+q.clickup_task_id,runtime_slot_released:false}}];

nodes.name: Queue — Mark External Sync Awaiting Review
Queue — Save External Sync Awaiting Review

parameters.jsCode: const base=$('Queue — Mark External Sync Awaiting Review').first().json;const s=base.final_synthesis||{};const lines=Array.isArray(s.result_lines)?s.result_lines.slice(0,4):['Runtime workflow completed.','Publish preview is ready.'];const roles=JSON.parse(base.queue_record.activated_roles_json||'[]');const text=['ГОТОВО','','Mission:',s.short_title||base.mission_title||base.mission_id,'','Результат:',...lines,'','Роли:',roles.join(', ')||'Not recorded','','Проверки:','- typecheck: PASS','- lint: PASS','- build: PASS','- test: PASS','','Код:',base.code_reference,'','Отчёт:',base.drive_report_url,'','ClickUp:',base.clickup_task_url,'','Статус:','Awaiting human review'].join('\n');return [{json:{...base,telegram_message:text}}];

parameters.queryString: ={{ "'1skcboyr_rPQOFN34iwMAqRvf97BYVllJ' in parents and name = '" + $json.report_name.replace(/'/g, "\'") + "' and trashed = false" }}

parameters.jsCode: const base=$('Build Critic Stop Notification').first().json;const file=$input.all().map(i=>i.json||{}).find(x=>x.id&&x.name===base.report_name);return [{json:{...base,drive_file_exists:!!file?.id,existing_drive_file_id:file?.id?String(file.id):'',existing_drive_url:file?.webViewLink||''}}];

const base=$('Drive — Select Blocked Agent Report').first().json;const id=String($json.id||base.existing_drive_file_id||'');if(!id)throw new Error('DRIVE_BLOCKED_REPORT_ID_MISSING');const url=String($json.webViewLink||base.existing_drive_url||('https://drive.google.com/file/d/'+id+'/view'));const map=JSON.parse(base.queue_record.clickup_status_map_json||'{}');if(!map.blocked)throw new Error('CLICKUP_BLOCKED_STATUS_NOT_FOUND');const q={...base.queue_record,drive_report_file_id:id,integration_status:'blocked',runtime_status:base.runtime.status,sync_status:'drive_synced',last_processed_at:new Date().toISOString(),next_action:'human_review'};return [{json:{...base,drive_report_file_id:id,drive_report_url:url,queue_record:q,clickup_blocked_status:map.blocked,integration_stage:'clickup'}}];

updateFields.content:
={{ 'go_irl_mission_id:' + $json.mission_id + '
Runtime status: ' + $json.runtime.status + '
Drive Agent Report: ' + $json.drive_report_url + '
Next step: Human review.
GitHub is the source of truth.' }}

parameters.jsCode: const base=$('Drive — Capture Blocked Report Link').first().json;const text=['ОСТАНОВЛЕНО','','Mission:',base.mission_id,'','Причина:',base.blocked_reason,'','Отчёт:',base.drive_report_url,'','ClickUp:','https://app.clickup.com/t/'+base.queue_record.clickup_task_id,'','Следующий шаг:','Human review'].join('\n');return [{json:{...base,telegram_message:text}}];

const input=$json||{};let base=input;for(const name of ['Build Runtime Mission Intake Command','Queue — Restore Approval Mission','Queue — Mark Awaiting Human Approval','Drive — Capture Report Link','Build Mission JSON']){try{const candidate=$(name).first().json;if(candidate?.mission_id){base={...candidate,...input};break}}catch{}}const message=String(input.error?.message||input.message||input.description||'Operation failed').replace(/(?:gho_|sk-|Bearer\s+)[A-Za-z0-9._-]+/gi,'[REDACTED]').replace(/[A-Za-z]:\\[^\s]+/g,'[LOCAL_PATH]').slice(0,500);const stage=String(base.integration_stage||'runtime');const isIntegration=['clickup','drive','telegram','queue','export'].includes(stage);const previous=Number(base.queue_record?.retry_count||0);const retry=isIntegration?Math.min(1,previous+1):previous;const q=base.queue_record?{...base.queue_record,integration_status:'failed',sync_status:isIntegration&&previous<1?'retry_required':'failed',retry_count:retry,last_processed_at:new Date().toISOString(),next_action:isIntegration&&previous<1?'retry integration once':'human review'}:null;return [{json:{...base,queue_record:q,safe_failure_reason:message,failure_stage:stage,retry_count:retry}}];

const base=$('Sanitize Operations Failure').first().json;const text=['ОСТАНОВЛЕНО','','Mission:',base.mission_id||'unknown','','Причина:',base.safe_failure_reason,'','Следующий шаг:',base.queue_record?.next_action||'Human review'].join('\n');return [{json:{...base,telegram_message:text,chat_id:base.chat_id||base.queue_record?.telegram_chat_id||''}}];

main.node: Queue — Mark External Sync Awaiting Review
Queue — Save External Sync Awaiting Review
